classes.description: Recent audits within the normal active window. These remain active by date and do not need explicit registry entries.
Historical audits that remain active because they anchor canonical tranche evidence, closure chains, or protected roadmap/whitepaper references.
Historical audits not listed in retain-evidence and not blocked by archive screening. These are eligible for archive migration.

summary.derivationMethod: Public-safe curation registry for the public repository; private retain-evidence audit paths are not exported.
